basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Satara Nursing Assistant/ Nursing Sister Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Satara has published the Nursing Assistant/ Nursing Sister Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Nursing Assistant/Nursing Sister position. Candidates aged 18 to 50 years and holding a Nursing Diploma/ Degree with 5 years of experience or being an ex-serviceman of the Medical Assistant trade with at least 5 years of service after training are eligible to apply offline through the official Sainik School Satara website. The application process is open until 21 July 2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and application form below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age as on 21-07-2026 Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Nursing Diploma/ Degree, 5 years experience or ex-serviceman of Medical Assistant trade with at least 5 years service after Training
qualification.details: Nursing Diploma/ Degree with 5 years experience or ex-serviceman of Medical Assistant trade with at least 5 years service after Training. Desirable: Higher Qualification and Experience, Experience of working in a residential school.

salary_details.details: Pay Level 4 Basic Pay Rs. 25,500/- per month as per 7 CPC.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Satara Nursing Assistant/Nursing Sister Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainiksatara.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Satara Nursing Assistant/ Nursing Sister Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Sainik School Satara Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Sainik School Satara Nursing Assistant/ Nursing Sister Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Satara Nursing Assistant/ Nursing Sister Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Nursing Diploma/ Degree with 5 years experience or ex-serviceman of Medical Assistant trade with at least 5 years service after Training. Desirable: Higher Qualification and Experience, Experience of working in a residential school.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age as on 21-07-2026 Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Pay Level 4 Basic Pay Rs. 25,500/- per month as per 7 CPC.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Satara Nursing Assistant/Nursing Sister Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.sainiksatara.org. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sainik School Satara Nursing Assistant/ Nursing Sister Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sainik School Satara Nursing Assistant/Nursing Sister recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Sainik School Satara Nursing Assistant/Nursing Sister posts is 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Nursing Diploma/Degree with 5 years of experience or be an ex-serviceman of the Medical Assistant trade with at least 5 years of service after training.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Nursing Assistant/Nursing Sister position?
faq.answer: The age limit for this post is between 18 years and 50 years, with the age calculated as of 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Nursing Assistant/Nursing Sister post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Nursing Assistant/Nursing Sister post in Sainik School Satara.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 25,500/- per month, as per Pay Level 4 Basic Pay under the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it by post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST category candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection stages for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Written Examination followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Satara, which is www.sainiksatara.org.
